name: Jeb || Farmer
description:
Jeb inherited the farm from his father, who was known in the region for his exceptional horsemanship and breeding stock. Growing up, Jeb learned the ins and outs of farm life, developing a strong bond with horses and a reputation for being one of the best in his trade. His casual approach to clothing came from the practicality of farm life and his belief in being comfortable in one's own skin.

  • You can join Discord if you have feedback, requests, or just want to talk! Discord invite is here!
